source.caveat: Rare slot demand and build usage are extracted from poe.ninja. Rare mod signatures and craft routes are rule-based recommendations, not direct item-mod exports.

modSignature: Damage, Accuracy, or Cast Speed suffix
craftPlan: Omen refine if two key mods land
riskFlags: 供給が多く価格競争になりやすい
耐性だけの品は差別化しにくい

trade.query:
PoE2 trade search recipe
League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Accessory / Ring
Base/type hint: Ring
Mode: Stat filters + Count group

[Required filters]
- +# to maximum Life or Mana (main filter)
- +#% to Elemental Resistances (second filter)

[Minimum targets]
- Life/Mana/ES: one strong prefix
- Total useful resists: 70%+ target
- Damage/speed suffix: one build-facing suffix

[Preferred filters]
- Damage, Accuracy, or Cast Speed suffix (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- resistance-only items with no life/resource/damage hook

required.label: +# to maximum Life or Mana
required.why: start here when filtering

required.label: +#% to Elemental Resistances
required.why: use Count >= 2 if supply is thin

preferred.label: Damage, Accuracy, or Cast Speed suffix
preferred.why: raise price if the first filters hit

minimums.label: Life/Mana/ES
minimums.why: rings without a core resource roll are hard to price up

minimums.label: Total useful resists
minimums.why: resist rings are common, total value needs to be obvious

minimums.label: Damage/speed suffix
minimums.why: separates the item from generic fixer rings

avoid: resistance-only items with no life/resource/damage hook

trade.query:
PoE2 trade search recipe
League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Accessory / Amulet
Base/type hint: Amulet
Mode: Stat filters + Count group

[Required filters]
- +1 to Level of all Attack Skills (main filter)
- +# to Dexterity or Strength (second filter)

[Minimum targets]
- +Level: +1 minimum, +2 watchlist
- Attributes or resource: one strong support roll
- Damage multiplier: high tier if present

[Preferred filters]
- +#% to Global Critical Multiplier (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- items missing the premium first filter

required.why: use Count >= 2 if supply is thin

preferred.label: +#% to Global Critical Multiplier
preferred.why: raise price if the first filters hit

minimums.label: +Level
minimums.why: most buyers start with a level filter

minimums.label: Attributes or resource
minimums.why: makes attribute-starved builds easier to fit

avoid: items missing the premium first filter

trade.query:
PoE2 trade search recipe
League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Armour / Boots
Base/type hint: Boots
Mode: Stat filters + Count group

[Required filters]
- +#% increased Movement Speed (main filter)
- +# to maximum Life (second filter)

[Minimum targets]
- Movement Speed: 25%+ preferred
- Life or ES: mid/high tier
- Total useful resists: 60%+ if no premium mod

[Preferred filters]

- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- resistance-only items with no life/resource/damage hook

trade.query:
PoE2 trade search recipe
League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Jewel
Base/type hint: Jewel
Mode: Manual stat search

[Required filters]
- build-specific damage mod (main filter)
- defensive or attribute mod (second filter)

[Minimum targets]
- Build-specific damage: two relevant lines
- Defense or attribute: one useful support line
- Corruption/high tier: manual watch

[Preferred filters]
- corrupted or high-tier roll watch (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- generic damage jewels with no exact build fit

required.label: build-specific damage mod
required.why: start here when filtering

required.label: defensive or attribute mod
required.why: use Count >= 2 if supply is thin

preferred.label: corrupted or high-tier roll watch
preferred.why: raise price if the first filters hit

minimums.label: Build-specific damage
minimums.why: jewels are bought by exact build fit

avoid: generic damage jewels with no exact build fit

Base/type hint: Staff
Mode: Stat filters + Count group

[Required filters]
- +2 to Level of all Spell Skills (main filter)
- +#% increased Spell Damage (second filter)

[Minimum targets]
- +Spell level: +2 target, +1 budget
- Spell damage: 80%+ target
- Cast speed: 10%+ if available

[Preferred filters]
- +#% to Cast Speed (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- items missing the premium first filter

craftPlan: Omen refine if two key mods land
riskFlags: 需要元ビルドの変化に注意
